summary:
Self-efficacy has no established role as a mediator linking transformational leadership to better sleep quality among healthcare workers according to available data. This conclusion stems directly from the absence of supporting literature or mechanisms connecting these variables within existing studies cited. 

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$

Self-efficacy is not supported as a mediatory factor between transformational leadership and healthcare workers' sleep quality in current research findings. Clinical evidence shows no direct linkage establishing its intermediary function in such pathways.
